1060501.name: Regeneration Ampule Activation
1060501.desc:
When hit, if at less than 20% HP, heal by 90% of Max HP and gain 1 K Corp Ampule.
After this activates, gain 1 [Vulnerable] every turn for the rest of the battle. (Once per battle)

1060521.name: High-grade Ampule
1060521.desc: At the start of the combat phase, give 2 K Corp Ampule to 1 ally with the lowest HP percentage.
